verses.1: A Psalm of David, for a memorial. LORD, do not rebuke me in Your wrath, And do not punish me in Your burning anger.
verses.2: For Your arrows have sunk deep into me, And Your hand has pressed down on me.
verses.3: There is no healthy part in my flesh because of Your indignation; There is no health in my bones because of my sin.
verses.4: For my guilty deeds have gone over my head; Like a heavy burden they weigh too much for me.
verses.5: My wounds grow foul and fester Because of my foolishness.
verses.6: I am bent over and greatly bowed down; I go in mourning all day long.
verses.7: For my sides are filled with burning, And there is no healthy part in my flesh.
verses.8: I feel faint and badly crushed; I groan because of the agitation of my heart.
verses.9: Lord, all my desire is before You; And my sighing is not hidden from You.
verses.10: My heart throbs, my strength fails me; And the light of my eyes, even that has gone from me.
verses.11: My loved ones and my friends stand aloof from my plague; And my kinsmen stand far away.
verses.12: Those who seek my life lay snares for me; And those who seek to injure me have threatened destruction, And they plot deception all day long.
verses.13: But I, like a person who is deaf, do not hear; And I am like a person who cannot speak, who does not open his mouth.
verses.14: Yes, I am like a person who does not hear, And in whose mouth are no arguments.
verses.15: For I wait for You, LORD; You will answer, Lord my God.
verses.16: For I said, “May they not rejoice over me, Who, when my foot slips, would exalt themselves over me.”
verses.17: For I am ready to fall, And my sorrow is continually before me.
verses.18: For I admit my guilt; I am full of anxiety because of my sin.
verses.19: But my enemies are vigorous and strong, And those who wrongfully hate me are many.
verses.20: And those who repay evil for good, They become my enemies, because I follow what is good.
verses.21: Do not abandon me, LORD; My God, do not be far from me!
verses.22: Hurry to help me, Lord, my salvation!
